over 25 years of experience in engineering & metal fabrication
providing the highest quality of metal fabrications
meeting all requirements and specifications

CNC Cutting

We provide CNC cutting using an HPR260 CNC HyPerfomance plasma cutting system

CNC Punching

We have advanced CNC punching capabilities that allow us to perform several sheet metal fabrication processes in a single cycle

Welding & Assembly

Our welders are AWS certified and specialize in welding enclosures, pipe manifolds, duct work, and other custom products

Part Repair

We provide part repair and services that can accommodate the needs of virtually any type of equipment

Welcome!

Welcome to Jupiter Design & Manufacturing LLC, a family-owned business based in Houston, Texas.

Please look around our website for information on our services, and don't hesitate to contact us with any questions.

About us

With over 25 years of experience in Houston metal fabrication & engineering, we're able to take upon any unique needs for each client. Whether you need metal skids for the oil field, pipe supports, structural pipe supports, shale shaker screens, part cut outs, cat walks, repair, fabrication, or punching. We guarantee on maintaining excellent standards of quality, on-schedule project completion and safety.
